summary: CRM UI/UX fixes and additions - All tests passed. Frontend: 100% success rate. Navbar updated (Dashboard first, no logo), Leads page redesigned with modern style, new Settings page with AD ID Mapping functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Navbar displays Dashboard as first tab (no logo)
Navbar shows all tabs: Dashboard, Leads, Customers, Inspections, Admin, Settings, Finance
Leads page displays with modern design (summary cards, filters, clean table)
Leads page has search input and filter dropdowns (Employee, Status, City, Source)
Leads page Add Lead button opens modal
Leads page Add Lead modal has all form fields (Name, Mobile, City, Source, Status, Service Type, Notes)
Leads page Add Lead modal Cancel and Create Lead buttons work
Leads page data table displays leads with pagination
Settings page displays with AD ID Mapping tab
Settings page Create Ad button opens modal
Settings Create Ad modal shows all fields: Ad Id, Ad Amount, City, Language, Campaign, Source
Settings Create Ad modal Cancel and Add buttons work
Creating a new ad mapping displays in the table with success toast
Ad mappings table shows Active toggle and Action buttons (Edit, Amount, Delete)
Ad mappings table has correct headers: Ad ID, Ad Name, City, Language, Campaign Type, Source, Active, Action
critical_code_review_comments: AD ID Mapping uses localStorage MOCK - not connected to backend API. Data persists in browser but not across sessions/devices.
seed_data_creation: Created test ad mappings (TEST_AD_001, TEST_AD_002) in localStorage for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX fixes complete. Key changes verified: 1) TopNavbar - Dashboard is first tab, no company logo, all 7 tabs present (Dashboard, Leads, Customers, Inspections, Admin, Settings, Finance), 2) LeadsPage - Modern design with summary cards, search/filters, clean table with pagination, Add Lead modal working, 3) SettingsPage - New page with AD ID Mapping tab, Create Ad modal with all required fields (Ad Id, Ad Amount, City, Language, Campaign, Source), table displays created mappings with Active toggle and Action buttons. NOTE: AD ID Mapping uses localStorage MOCK - not connected to backend.

mocked_features.AD ID Mapping: Uses localStorage mock (adMappingsApi in SettingsPage.jsx) - CRUD operations stored in browser localStorage, not backend
